Benchmark Results for Large Language Models on Scientific QA

Abstract

We evaluate 12 large language models on a new scientific question-answering
benchmark spanning physics, chemistry, and biology.

1 Introduction

Large language models have shown remarkable capabilities across diverse tasks.
However, their performance on domain-specific scientific questions remains
understudied.

2 Results

Table 1: Overall accuracy by model and domain

Model           Physics  Chemistry  Biology  Average
GPT-4           0.823    0.791      0.834    0.816
Claude-3        0.815    0.802      0.828    0.815
Gemini-Ultra    0.798    0.776      0.811    0.795
LLaMA-70B       0.734    0.712      0.756    0.734
Mixtral-8x7B    0.721    0.698      0.742    0.720
Falcon-180B     0.709    0.685      0.731    0.708
Yi-34B          0.687    0.671      0.703    0.687
Qwen-72B        0.701    0.689      0.718    0.703
DeepSeek-67B    0.693    0.678      0.711    0.694
Phi-2           0.612    0.589      0.634    0.612
Mistral-7B      0.645    0.623      0.667    0.645
LLaMA-7B        0.534    0.512      0.556    0.534

Table 2: Performance by question difficulty

Difficulty   Easy    Medium   Hard    Expert
GPT-4        0.95    0.87     0.72    0.61
Claude-3     0.94    0.86     0.73    0.59
Gemini       0.93    0.84     0.69    0.56

Table 3: Statistical significance (p-values, paired t-test)

           GPT-4   Claude  Gemini  LLaMA70
GPT-4      -       0.412   0.003   <0.001
Claude     0.412   -       0.008   <0.001
Gemini     0.003   0.008   -       <0.001
LLaMA70    <0.001  <0.001  <0.001  -

3 Discussion

The top three models (GPT-4, Claude-3, Gemini-Ultra) show no statistically
significant differences in overall performance. However, performance degrades
substantially for expert-level questions across all models.

4 Conclusion

Our benchmark reveals that current LLMs have strong but uneven scientific
reasoning capabilities. Expert-level questions remain challenging.

References

[1] OpenAI (2023). GPT-4 Technical Report.
[2] Anthropic (2024). Claude 3 Model Card.
